safety_exception.author: Reviewing Attorney
safety_exception.basis: client reports a danger of abuse if the other parent learns the new address — notice to the court under 19-A M.R.S. § 1653(14)

child_names: Drew K. Moe (born 2017) and Robin J. Moe (born 2020)
safety_basis: there is a history of domestic abuse by the other parent against the relocating parent, and a protection from abuse order has previously issued in this matter
document_label: Notice of Intended Relocation (to the Court)
